description: Discussion on Solana Validator Community updates and Kronos project by Nick from Kronos, covering 1.10 updates and the functionality of the Kronos keeper network for Solana.
topic_summary: Updates on Solana 1.10, including QWIK development and account index memory limit improvements [t=47:45]. Nick from Kronos discusses the keeper network model, token mechanics, and the role of validators in task automation [t=148:09].
